description: M-26-14 Element 2: Detects log ingestion rate drops per data stream (low_count + low_non_zero_count, 1h)

detectors.detector_description: Low event count per dataset — partial ingestion degradation
Dataset producing zero events — total ingestion silence

custom_settings.m2614_requirement: Element 2 — Collection Coverage | M-26-14 §2 Log Centralization, §3 Timestamp Timeliness
custom_settings.m2614_tuning_note: model_memory_limit 512mb estimated for 20-50 active datasets. Tune upward for deployments with >50 datasets — each partition requires independent model state.
custom_settings.m2614_acceptance_criteria: Fires within 1 bucket (1h) of a data stream going silent. For >=30% volume drop, fires within 2h.
custom_settings.m2614_description: M-26-14 Element 2: Detects anomalous drops in log ingestion rate per data stream dataset. Two detectors: low_count catches partial volume degradation; low_non_zero_count catches total dataset silence. Distinguishes systemic pipeline failure (all datasets affected) from individual stream failures. M-26-14 §2 (log centralization) and §3 (timestamp timeliness). Required for Element 2 L2+ compliance health monitoring.
